headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Chase DeLauter leading the Rays' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. The Los Angeles Angels fell short in Chicago, dropping a 2-3 decision to the White Sox despite a strong outing from Erick Fedde. The Seattle Mariners took down the Minnesota Twins 5-3, with Cooper Criswell earning the win.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, with Detroit Tigers shortstop Javier Báez placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right ankle sprain. Casey Mize has also been placed on the 15-day injured list with a right adductor strain. Other teams have also reported injuries, including the Milwaukee Brewers, San Francisco Giants, Boston Red Sox, Chicago White Sox, Miami Marlins, and Minnesota Twins.

The Toronto Blue Jays made a roster move, trading 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Fall to Guardians in 3-1 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Chase DeLauter leading the Rays' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Chicago White Sox, unable to overcome a late rally. Mike Trout led the Angels' offense with a home run and an RBI, while Erick Fedde pitched 7 strong innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Mariners Take Down Twins 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a 5-3 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Cooper Criswell earning the win. Taj Bradley led the Mariners' pitching effort, tossing 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall Short in Texas**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees suffered a 0-3 loss to the Texas Rangers, with Nathan Eovaldi earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief.

top_news.title: **Tigers Place Javier Báez on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers shortstop Javier Báez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right ankle sprain. The injury occurred on April 29, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays traded 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash on April 28, 2026.
